summary: Replaced simulated autonomous-loop step internals with real adapter-backed runtime. Created adapter-runtime.ts with resolveAdapterRuntime, executeAdapterStep, and per-step adapter-aware implementations (discover, plan, execute, verify). The module resolves agents from Supabase, maps adapter types to known toolsets, and produces structured metadata throughout the loop. The existing run/approval/guardrail scaffolding is preserved by augmenting autonomousLoop.ts imports.

strengths: Clean separation of concerns: adapter resolution, step execution, and helper functions are well-organized
ADAPTER_TOOLSETS and ADAPTER_COMPLEXITY_FACTORS maps provide extensible adapter configuration
Preserves existing milestone-2 scaffolding by composing with the autonomous loop rather than replacing it
Comprehensive 726-line test suite with 15 test cases covering resolution, step execution, and error paths

issues.description: The executeAdapterStep function is synchronous for all steps except the switch/case signature is async. The discover/plan/execute/verify functions are all synchronous. The async on executeAdapterStep is harmless but slightly misleading.
issues.suggestion: Consider documenting that the async is intentional for future real-adapter integration that may need async calls.

testCoverage.notes: 15 tests covering adapter resolution, all 4 step types, toolset resolution, model resolution, and registry integration.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Adapter step implementations produce structured metadata but don't make real LLM/tool calls yet. This is expected for the proof surface and will be extended in future milestones.
